Locations.title: Locations
Locations.reviewHelp: Review your saved offices, update their booking details, and confirm each office has the right coordinates and timezone.
Locations.createHelp: Add a new office with its address and map coordinates so the app can derive the correct timezone for booking.
Locations.reviewListDescription: Select an office to review or edit its details.
Locations.createSummary: {count, plural, =0 {No offices created yet} =1 {1 office already configured} other {# offices already configured}}
Locations.noLocationSelectedDescription: Choose an office from the list to review its details, logo, and booking configuration.

Locations.timeZoneReadyCount: {count, plural, =0 {No office timezones ready} =1 {1 office timezone ready} other {# office timezones ready}}

Locations.coordinatesRequired: Add latitude and longitude before saving. The office timezone is derived from these coordinates.
Locations.coordinatesInvalid: Latitude or longitude is not valid. Please enter real decimal coordinates.
Locations.coordinatesHelp: These coordinates are used to derive the office timezone and keep booking times aligned with the office's local time.
Locations.coordinatesOptionalHelp: Coordinates are optional now. Add them only if you want map precision or nearby-office features later.
Locations.coordinatesOptionalIncomplete: If you add coordinates, provide both latitude and longitude.
Locations.createDescription: Configure a new office with address, timezone, and booking assets.
Locations.reviewDescription: Update this office's booking-facing information and timezone source data.
Locations.timeZonePlaceholder: Select or type an IANA timezone, for example America/Chicago
Locations.timeZoneHelp: This timezone is used as the source of truth for availability, booking, emails, and calendar invites.
Locations.timezoneRequired: Select the office timezone before saving. Booking and availability use this value.
Locations.timezoneAutodetectNotice: If you leave timezone empty, the app will try to detect it from the full address when geocoding is configured. Otherwise, select it manually.
Locations.storageUploadUnavailable: Logo upload is unavailable because Supabase Storage is not configured.
Locations.logoHelp: Upload a logo to help customers recognize the office during booking.

help.officeName: The public name customers will see for this office during booking and confirmation.
help.address: Use the full office address. If geocoding is configured, the app can try to derive coordinates and timezone from it.
help.description: Optional context shown internally or on public office views, depending on how the location is used.
help.timeZone: This is the office-local timezone used for availability, booking validation, emails, and calendar invites.
help.latitude: Optional decimal latitude. Add it if you want map precision or nearby-office features.
help.longitude: Optional decimal longitude. Add it if you want map precision or nearby-office features.

Locations.noLocationsDescription: Start by adding your first location to manage schedules and services

Locations.imageGuidelines: Your image should be below 4 MB, accepted formats: Jpg, Png, Svg
Locations.dragDropOrClick: Drag and drop or click to upload images
Locations.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this location?
Locations.confirmDeleteDescription: This will permanently delete this location and all related data: business hours, overrides, time slots, and bookings linked to it. This action cannot be undone.

Availability.title: Availability Management
Availability.description: Create date-based availability by professional, office, and session length.
Availability.manageAvailability: Manage real booking inventory by professional and office.
Availability.errorLoadingTherapists: Error loading professionals. Please try again.
Availability.selectLocationDescription: Select a location from the list to manage its availability schedules.
Availability.errorLoadingLocations: Error loading locations. Please try again.
Availability.plannerDescription: Open date ranges, exclude days, and fine-tune session windows per day.
Availability.reviewDescription: Browse past and future months to review open days, remaining sessions, and saved periods.
Availability.periodTitleAutoHelp: Leave this blank and the system will create a title from the location and date range.
Availability.excludedDatesHelp: Use YYYY-MM-DD values separated by commas or spaces.
Availability.excludedDateOutsideRange: Excluded dates must stay inside the selected period.
Availability.excludedDateRestored: Excluded date added back to the period.
Availability.createDisabledProfessional: Sign in as the professional account before creating availability.
Availability.createDisabledLocation: Select a location to create and review availability periods.
Availability.createDisabledDates: Choose a start and end date to create the period.
Availability.createDisabledSessionLength: Set a session length before creating availability.
Availability.createDisabledTimeRanges: Add at least one valid time range before creating availability.
Availability.usingProfessionalContext: Using the professional configured for this app.
Availability.noProfessionalContext: No professional context is configured for this app. Set a default therapist or sign in as a professional.
Availability.chooseLocation: Select an office to manage availability.
Availability.chooseLocationToReview: Select a location to review month data and availability periods.
Availability.chooseTherapistAndLocation: Select a professional and office to manage availability.
Availability.monthSummary: Review the dated availability blocks for the selected month.
Availability.confirmDeletePeriod: Delete this availability period and all of its day settings?

help.currentMonth: The month currently loaded in the review tab. All summary counts and visible periods are based on this month.
help.selectedMonth: Choose which past or future month you want to review for this location.
help.openDays: Days in the selected month that currently have active availability for booking.
help.remainingSessions: The total unbooked sessions still available after existing bookings are taken into account.
help.createMonthOpenDays: How many days in this month already have active availability, so you can avoid duplicating inventory.
help.periodTitle: Optional label for this availability block. If you leave it empty, the system generates one from the location and date range.
help.sessionLength: How long each bookable session lasts for the period or day you are editing.
help.startDate: The first day this availability period should open for booking.
help.endDate: The last day included in this availability period.
help.notes: Optional internal context for you or your team. These notes are not intended as public booking copy.
help.excludedDates: Dates inside the selected period that should stay unavailable even though the surrounding days are open.
help.timeRanges: The hours during the day when clients can book. You can add multiple ranges if you have breaks.
help.spansMonths: This period starts in one month and ends in another, so the same availability block covers more than one calendar month.
help.restoreExcludedDate: Adds the excluded date back into the period using its saved session length and time ranges.
help.markDayClosed: Keeps the day inside the period, but closes it so no sessions can be booked on that date.

Booking.patientLookupNewTitle: We will create your patient profile automatically

Booking.marketingConsentText: You agree to receive marketing text messages, including Loyalty messages, coupons and discounts, to the phone number you provided from this business. Send STOP by text message to cancel your subscription to messages from this business at any time or send HELP for more information. Message and data rates may apply. Joining this program is not a condition of purchase. You certify that you are 18 years or older.

Blog.title: Blogs and News
Blog.subtitle: Read Professional Articles and Latest Articles

Hero.title: Hello, I'm Alberto Estrada
Hero.subtitle: Alphabiotic Specialist
Hero.description: My purpose is to accompany you to remember who you are in essence. Alphabiotic Alignment is not a technique or a remedy, but a transformative experience that opens the door to your inner balance: when mind, heart and body align, life flows with clarity, peace and strength.
Hero.helper: Choose a location now or continue to explore all available visits during booking.
Hero.showcaseSummary: Built for a calmer in-person booking experience with clear availability and simple confirmation.
Hero.locationsAvailable: {count, plural, =1 {# location available} other {# locations available}}

HomeLanding.careTitle: Support that feels grounded, personal, and clear
HomeLanding.careDescription: AlphaBiotic sessions are presented as a calm in-person experience: less noise, less friction, and a clearer sense of what comes next.

pillars.oneDescription: Visits are structured to feel focused and steady, so the experience stays simple from arrival to follow-up.
pillars.twoDescription: The tone of the practice is quiet and direct, giving people a more centered way to begin.
pillars.threeDescription: Booking, confirmation, and visit details stay easy to understand without overwhelming the patient.

HomeLanding.guideFallbackBio: A grounded, personal approach focused on balance, clarity, and a more natural sense of alignment.
HomeLanding.guideNote: The public profile, booking flow, and follow-up details are kept intentionally simple so the experience feels steady from the very first step.
HomeLanding.journeyTitle: From first click to confirmed visit
HomeLanding.journeyDescription: The booking path is designed to stay short and clear, so visitors can move from curiosity to a confirmed appointment without extra friction.

steps.oneTitle: Choose where you want to visit
steps.oneDescription: Start with the location that feels easiest for you, or continue without selecting one and review options later.
steps.twoTitle: Pick your preferred day and time
steps.twoDescription: The booking flow guides you through the available schedule without adding unnecessary decisions.
steps.threeDescription: Once booked, the appointment details, confirmation number, email, and calendar invite stay in sync.

HomeLanding.locationsTitle: Choose the place that fits you best
HomeLanding.locationsDescription: You can start with a preferred location now or continue to review availability during booking.
HomeLanding.locationsEmpty: Locations will appear here as they are added to the public profile.

Contact.title: Do you have any questions?
Contact.subtitle: Get in touch
Contact.description: We are here to help you. Send us a message and we will respond as soon as possible.

form.name: Name
form.servicesPlaceholder: What service are you interested in?
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...

appointments.title: Email yourself a summary of upcoming appointments
appointments.description: Enter the email you used when booking and we will send a summary of the upcoming sessions we find for this address, along with contact details for the practice.
appointments.supportTitle: Keep the next visit easy to track
appointments.supportDescription: If you want a quick reminder of what is coming up, request an email summary and keep the visit details close at hand.
appointments.supportPointOneDescription: We send the upcoming appointment date, location, booking code, therapist details when available, and any notes already attached to the booking.
appointments.supportPointTwoDescription: The message also includes the public practice description and the best contact details in case you need to confirm something before your visit.
appointments.successDescription: If there are appointments for this email, we sent a summary with the next visit details and contact information.
appointments.error: We could not send the appointments summary right now.
appointments.contactDescription: If anything looks off, contact the practice and we will help you confirm the details.

urgentHelp.title: Need immediate help?
urgentHelp.description: If you have an urgent inquiry, you can contact us directly by phone or email.

CompanyProfile.title: Company
CompanyProfile.description: Update the public business information and landing-page sections used across the website and booking flow.
CompanyProfile.brandSectionDescription: Set the primary identity shown on the public site.
CompanyProfile.publicSectionDescription: These fields drive your general public business profile, contact page, and booking-facing summary.
CompanyProfile.landingSectionDescription: Edit the visible homepage sections the way a client expects to manage a simple site builder.
CompanyProfile.landingSectionHiddenHint: This section is hidden on the landing page. Turn it back on at any time.
CompanyProfile.landingLocaleHint: Landing-page copy is now saved per locale. Switch the dashboard language to edit the other translation.
CompanyProfile.landingPreviewDescription: Shows the effective landing page using your current edits, even before saving.
CompanyProfile.landingPreviewFallbackHint: Blank fields are not stored as defaults. They inherit the current translated site copy, and that effective result is what you see in this preview.
CompanyProfile.landingPreviewEmpty: All landing-page sections are hidden. Turn at least one section back on to preview the page.
CompanyProfile.landingHeroDescription: Controls the top hero banner for the landing page.
CompanyProfile.landingHeroPublicFieldsHint: Company name, specialty headline, and main summary still come from Public Content.
CompanyProfile.landingSupportDescription: Controls the section that starts with “Support that feels grounded, personal, and clear.”
CompanyProfile.landingJourneyDescription: Explains the booking path from first click to confirmed visit.
CompanyProfile.landingLocationsDescription: Controls the public locations block and its empty state.
